assignments.name: Assign_Source_Store_and_Pick_List_status
assignments.label: Assign Source Store and Pick List status

decisions.name: is_By_Pass_Ordering_and_Existing_Item
decisions.label: is Bypass Ordering and Existing Item?

decisions.name: is_PR_Approver_not_the_Submitter
decisions.label: is PR Approver not the Submitter?

Flow.description: 25 JULY 2022: Changed intPOItemCancelled and intPOItemStillFulfilled to decimal(2)

formulas.name: strDisputeChatterMessageFormula
formulas.expression: "@[" + {!Get_User_Purchase.Id} +"] @[" + {!$Record.Purchase_Request_Approver__c} +"] Purchase Request " + {!$Record.Name} + " status changed to Dispute. Dispute Reason: " + {!$Record.Dispute_Reason__c}

Flow.label: Purchase Request – AFTER - Automation
